theme: Max excursion before first retest of the 9:30 candle
method: Subject = 9:30-9:45 candle. After it closes, track how far price travels above its high or below its low BEFORE the first wick-back to either extreme. Express as % of the opening candle's range. ALL counters committed at 15:45 for denominator consistency.
v1_bug_note: Original v1 had hitDays incrementing during forward bars while totalDays gated at 15:45, producing 'instant retest' = -9 (totalDays - hitDays). v2 fix: per-day variable captured during forward bars, all counters committed together at 15:45.

summary.interpretation: On the typical day, price expands ~37.5% of the opening range past one extreme before pulling back to retest the other side. About 5.8% of days expand more than the full opening range before retracing. No days extend more than 2x the range.
